caption:
A cosy UK staycation at Burnham Beeches Hotel🎄✨

Located in the Buckinghamshire countryside 🌿, Burnham Beeches Hotel perfectly balances period elegance with modern amenities. Their cosy rooms and suites provide relaxing and comfortable accommodation.

Experience the festive afternoon tea at Evergreen☕, a delicious dinner at Arden, and treat yourself to spa treatments @templespa 💫

Burnham Beeches Hotel has a central location for sightseeing, with attractions such Windsor Castle, The Great Park, Royal Ascot, and Legoland nearby

📍 Burnham Beeches Hotel, Grove Rd, Burnham, Slough SL1 8DP, @burnhambeecheshotel (less than 1 hour away from London)
